state_space: Directed graph of supplier-buyer inventory levels and lead times
dynamics_operator: Order fulfilling, production scheduling, transportation logistics
perturbation_operator: Demand shocks, supplier bankruptcies, logistical blockages, natural disasters
stability_condition: Buffer inventories > perturbation amplitude; localized containment of node failures
failure_mode: Cascading stockouts, bullwhip effect runaway, systemic network collapse
timescale_regime: Days to months (production cycles and logistical transport)
notes: Systemic interconnectedness converts local perturbations into propagating cascades without sufficient buffer capacity.
persistence_ontology_rationale: Derived via structural matching of observables and dynamics to ontology definitions.

metric_layer.distance_definition: Numeric distance strictly derived from domain object fields.

assumptions: Assumed no numeric boundaries exist since none provided.

measurement_layer.distance_provenance: Deterministically triaged via M-Layer v0 rules.
